LAW AND MOTION 301, MS. ORR INFORMED THE COURT THAT A SETTLEMENT HAVE BEEN REACHED BY THE PARTIES IN THIS CASE AND THAT A SETTLEMENT RELEASE DOCUMENT STILL NEEDS TO BE BE SIGNED BY HER CLIENT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANTS VICTORIA'S SECRET STORES, LLC AND APRIL MOFFITT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS HAVE SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NO FACTS TO SUPPORT THE CLAIMS MADE AGAINST THEM IN THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THOSE CLAIMS. THE COURT IS CONCERNED ABOUT THE SETTLEMENT HAVING BEEN REACHED BUT STILL NOT DOCUMENTED AND ASKED MR. TOLSON TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER WHETHER IT IS APPROPRIATE TO GO FORWARD OR NOT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LUCILLE WINSTON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ACTED DILIGENTLY. SHE COULD HAVE KNOWN AT A MUCH EARLIER DATE THAT MR. WASHINGTON WAS NOT DISCHARGED AS A RESULT OF THE INCIDENT. IT IS TOO CLOSE TO THE TRIAL DATE TO PERMIT THE ADDITION OF A PUNITIVE DAMAGES REQUEST THAT IS BASED ON A PURPORTED FACT THAT WAS EASILY DETERMINABLE MUCH EARLIER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Third Amended Complt
Off Calendar Oct-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN FITZPATRICK VANNUCCI, TEL. NO. 981-7500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LENORE C. KELLY OF WILSON ELSER LLP, TEL. NO. 625-9254 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF LUCILLE WINSTON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Third Amended Complaint is denied. Plaintiff has not acted diligently. She could have known at a much earlier date that Mr. Washington was not discharged as a result of the incident. It is too close to the trial date to permit the addition of a punitive damages request that is based on a purported fact that was easily determinable much earlier. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WYKEISHA ORR OF THE ORR FIRM, TEL. NO. (510) 985-4600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ZACHARY S. TOLSON OF THE LAW OFFICES OF JENKINS, GOODMAN & HAMILTON LLP, TEL. NO. 705-0400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - MS. ORR INFORMED THE COURT THAT A SETTLEMENT HAVE BEEN REACHED BY THE PARTIES IN THIS CASE AND THAT A SETTLEMENT RELEASE DOCUMENT STILL NEEDS TO BE BE SIGNED BY HER CLIENT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANTS VICTORIA'S SECRET STORES, LLC AND APRIL MOFFITT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS HAVE SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NO FACTS TO SUPPORT THE CLAIMS MADE AGAINST THEM IN THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT, AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THOSE CLAIMS. THE COURT IS CONCERNED ABOUT THE SETTLEMENT HAVING BEEN REACHED BUT STILL NOT DOCUMENTED AND ASKED MR. TOLSON TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER WHETHER IT IS APPROPRIATE TO GO FORWARD OR NOT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
